name: Novel Outage: JWKS Endpoint Unreachable on auth-token-service
description: An unseen authentication handshake failure due to a JWKS endpoint issue. This has zero local runbook/postmortem matches.
expected_diagnosis: Authentication handshake failure because the upstream JWKS endpoint on auth-token-service is unreachable (firewall or network policy block).

alert_payload.details: TokenValidationError: The JWKS signing keys endpoint 'https://auth-token-service.internal/oauth/certs' is unreachable. Connection timed out after 5000ms.
